# BidKind

A polymorphic container for all bid variants in the Casper 2.x auction system.

## Import

```ts
import { BidKind } from 'casper-js-sdk';
```

## Class

### `BidKind`

A discriminated union that holds one of several bid types. Only one field is set at a time.

| Property | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `unified?` | `Bid` | Legacy unified bid (Casper 1.x) |
| `validator?` | `ValidatorBid` | Validator bid |
| `delegator?` | `Delegator` | Delegator bid |
| `bridge?` | `Bridge` | Bridge bid used during validator key changes |
| `credit?` | `Credit` | Credit bid |
| `reservation?` | `Reservation` | Reserved delegation slot bid |
| `unbond?` | `Unbond` | Pending unbonding request |

## Usage

```ts
import { RpcClient, HttpHandler } from 'casper-js-sdk';

const client = new RpcClient(new HttpHandler('http://node:7777/rpc'));
const { auctionState } = await client.getLatestAuctionInfo();

for (const wrapper of auctionState.bids) {
  const { bid } = wrapper;

  if (bid.validator) {
    console.log('Validator bid, staked:', bid.validator.stakedAmount.toString());
  } else if (bid.delegator) {
    console.log('Delegator bid, to:', bid.delegator.validatorPublicKey.toHex());
  } else if (bid.credit) {
    console.log('Credit bid');
  } else if (bid.bridge) {
    console.log('Bridge bid');
  }
}
```

## See Also

- [`Bid`](/types/bid) - Individual bid type definitions
- [`AuctionState`](/types/auction-state) - Contains `BidKindWrapper[]`
